PLAINTIFF DANIEL BRAUNING'S APPLICATION TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE BY ROBERT S. SOLA.

APPEARANCES: Andrew J. Ogilvie, Esq. of Anderson Ogilvie & Brewer LLP 651-1952 for pltf & moving party; no other appearances.
